understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the green gem tile marked with `+` in each level. In this BP35 level, the gem was located at [4, 1], but I fell onto a spike tile at [4, 5] while trying to go down, ending the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement: The player moves left/right normally on flat ground. Gravity is downward, so stepping off a ledge or when a tile below is missing causes the player to fall until landing on a solid tile. Clicks: Clicking a tile removes it, creating gaps; if the player is standing on a removed tile, they fall. Hazards: Spike tiles kill the player instantly on contact. Undo/Attempts: Each level gives 2 attempts with 50 turns each; failing restarts the level. Efficient pathfinding to the gem while avoiding spikes and managing clickable tiles is required.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the green gem tile marked with `+` in each level. In this BP35 level, the gem was located at [4, 1], but I fell onto a spike tile at [4, 5] while trying to go down, ending the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement: The player moves left/right normally on flat ground. Gravity is downward, so stepping off a ledge or when a tile below is missing causes the player to fall until landing on a solid tile. Clicks: Clicking a tile removes it, creating gaps; if the player is standing on a removed tile, they fall. Hazards: Spike tiles kill the player instantly on contact. Undo/Attempts: Each level gives 2 attempts with 50 turns each; failing restarts the level. Efficient pathfinding to the gem while avoiding spikes and managing clickable tiles is required.
